name: ecohabit-ai
description: Production-ready Carbon Footprint Awareness Platform monorepo.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @ecohabit/shared && npm run build -w @ecohabit/api && npm run build -w @ecohabit/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @ecohabit/api && npm run lint -w @ecohabit/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @ecohabit/shared && npm run test -w @ecohabit/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ecohabit/shared && npm run typecheck -w @ecohabit/api && npm run typecheck -w @ecohabit/web
